gold.title: Aurora Background
gold.reason: Highly polished full-section hero background with CSS-only aurora animation, 28k downloads and 146 likes; instantly wows on any SaaS or portfolio site.

gold.title: Background Gradient Animation
gold.reason: Smooth, interactive multi-layered gradient animation with mouse tracking and fully customisable colours; 6.5k downloads and wide SaaS applicability.

gold.title: Wavy Background
gold.reason: Full-screen animated simplex-noise wave background wrapping children; elegant, colourful, high download count (5.7k) and 50 likes.

gold.title: Sparkles
gold.reason: Production-ready configurable particle background using tsParticles; highest downloads in the set (17.6k) and 121 likes — a proven crowd-pleaser.

gold.title: Background Paths
gold.reason: Full hero section with animated SVG path lines plus animated gradient title and CTA button; 14k downloads and 53 likes — complete, ready-to-ship.

gold.title: Shape Landing Hero
gold.reason: Complete dark-mode hero section with floating translucent shapes, gradient headline, badge and body text; 16k downloads and 69 likes — visually striking.

gold.title: Flickering Grid
gold.reason: Canvas-based flickering grid with viewport observer and resize handling; 3.9k downloads and 60 likes — popular, versatile SaaS hero backdrop.

gold.title: Background Beams
gold.reason: Animated SVG beam paths with framer-motion gradients sweeping along them; 3.6k downloads and 46 likes — clean and modern for SaaS hero sections.

gold.title: Animated Gradient With SVG
gold.reason: Multi-colour animated blob gradient using SVG circles and CSS variables; elegant tech-startup aesthetic, 1.6k downloads and 39 likes.

gold.title: Beams Background
gold.reason: Full-screen canvas beam animation with pulsing coloured rays on dark background; complete hero section with motion headline and subtext — 4.6k downloads.

silver.title: Hero Highlight
silver.reason: Interactive dot-pattern hero with mouse-tracking radial mask and animated text highlight span; solid utility but more of a building block than a full section.

silver.title: Background Boxes
silver.reason: Isometric hover-colour grid background; visually impressive but the skew effect is very specific and may not suit all brand styles — 2.8k downloads.

silver.title: Vortex Background
silver.reason: Simplex-noise particle vortex on canvas with framer-motion fade-in wrapper; dramatic CTA background — 2.4k downloads but dark/exotic in tone.

silver.title: Particles
silver.reason: Mouse-reactive particle system with configurable colour, density and velocity; good general-purpose background — 3.6k downloads and 44 likes.

silver.title: Retro Grid
silver.reason: Animated scrolling 3D-perspective grid with gradient fade; clean and on-trend for SaaS landing pages — 1.9k downloads and 23 likes.

silver.title: Animated Grid Pattern
silver.reason: SVG grid with randomly fading highlighted squares; subtle and versatile background accent — 2.6k downloads and 27 likes.

silver.title: Meteors
silver.reason: Simple CSS-animated meteor streak effect; effective additive overlay but only animates a single repeated element — 1.8k downloads.

silver.title: Shooting Stars
silver.reason: SVG shooting-star animation with gradient trail across the full viewport; nice accent effect but renders only one star at a time — 1.7k downloads.

silver.title: Gooey Filter
silver.reason: SVG filter primitive that creates gooey blob merging on any children; clever utility with 2.5k downloads and 63 likes but is a modifier, not a standalone section.

silver.title: Glow
silver.reason: Radial gradient glow overlay with positioning variants (top/bottom/center/above/below); well-engineered utility component but requires composition — 1k downloads.

silver.title: Background Beams With Collision
silver.reason: Beam-collision particle explosion animation; visually interesting but heavy and niche, better as a card accent than a full hero background — 1.1k downloads.

silver.title: BG Patterns
silver.reason: Six CSS gradient pattern variants (dots, grid, stripes, etc.) with eight mask modes; highly reusable utility — solid Silver for its range of applicability.

silver.title: Warp Background
silver.reason: 3D-perspective warp box with animated coloured beam borders on all four sides; distinctive but opinionated — good for feature callout sections.

silver.title: Gradient Background
silver.reason: Framer Motion cycling linear-gradient background with optional overlay and centered content slot; simple but clean and immediately usable — 62 downloads but well-built.

silver.title: Wave Background
silver.reason: Dense interactive SVG wave lines responding to mouse velocity with simplex noise; impressive interaction design, niche dark aesthetic — useful for creative studios.

bronze.title: spiral-animation
bronze.reason: Black canvas GSAP spiral with Chinese comments, no title/description, no real content slot — raw art piece rather than a usable marketing background.

bronze.title: Canvas Reveal Effect
bronze.reason: WebGL/Three.js dot-matrix shader effect; heavy dependency (three + @react-three/fiber), reveal-on-hover mechanic suits card components not full hero sections.

bronze.title: Radar Effect
bronze.reason: Concentric-circle radar sweep with icon containers; only 35 downloads and 0 likes — niche tech/security widget, not a general marketing background.

bronze.title: Stars Background
bronze.reason: Canvas twinkling stars; extremely minimal, dark-only, very low downloads (402) — simple ambient filler that won't impress on most business sites.

bronze.title: Pixel Trail
bronze.reason: Mouse-trail pixel grid that lights up on hover; interactive gimmick requiring pointer interaction — not suitable as a passive page background.

bronze.title: Grid Pattern
bronze.reason: Static SVG grid pattern with optional highlighted squares; very basic, no animation — primarily a utility primitive, 3 likes.

bronze.title: Spooky Smoke Animation
bronze.reason: WebGL2 GLSL smoke shader; halloween-themed name signals extreme niche, only 41 downloads and 0 likes — inappropriate for mainstream business redesigns.

bronze.title: Etheral Shadow
bronze.reason: SVG turbulence displacement mask that loads an external Framer image URL; hard-coded external dependency and hardcoded 'Etheral Shadows' title text reduce reusability.

bronze.title: Tiles
bronze.reason: Hover-colour tile grid using framer-motion; no description, 1 like, 950 downloads — similar to Background Boxes but simpler and less polished.

bronze.title: Blueprint Shader Grid
bronze.reason: WebGL2 GLSL scrolling blueprint grid shader named 'asd'; experimental/art piece with 52 downloads and 0 likes — too niche and hard to customise.

bronze.title: animated-beam
bronze.reason: SVG beam connecting two DOM refs via gradient animation; a connector utility for diagram-style UIs, not a standalone hero background component.

bronze.title: Background Components
bronze.reason: Trivially wraps a single yellow radial-gradient div; essentially a one-liner with 359 downloads and 0 likes — too simple to provide real design value.

bronze.title: Dotted Surface
bronze.reason: Three.js 3D animated dot grid; heavy WebGL dependency for a subtle effect, 0 likes — overkill and not suitable for general marketing page redesigns.

bronze.title: Falling Pattern
bronze.reason: CSS-gradient falling rain-line pattern with motion blur overlay; very low downloads (91) and 0 likes — interesting but too decorative and niche.

bronze.title: Gradient Dots
bronze.reason: Hexagonal dot grid with full rainbow hue-rotate animation; overly colourful and jarring for typical business/SaaS sites — 106 downloads and 0 likes.

bronze.title: Entropy
bronze.reason: Fixed-size 400px canvas showing order-vs-chaos particle simulation; fixed dimensions and art-project framing make it unsuitable as a page background.

bronze.title: FlickeringGridHero
bronze.reason: Near-duplicate of dillionverma's FlickeringGrid with an inline cn() helper; redundant, lower quality, 351 downloads and 0 likes.

bronze.title: ParticleTextEffect
bronze.reason: Fixed 1000x500 canvas cycling through hardcoded words with particle physics; interactive toy rather than a background — unsuitable for automatic redesign use.

bronze.title: SpiralAnimation
bronze.reason: Canvas GSAP 3D spiral with 5000 particles in black only, 1.2k downloads and 0 likes — duplicate of Kain0127's version, same niche black-canvas art style.
